text: In the first space, there is a quiet unease in the cleanliness and order—minimal furniture, soft lighting, and echoes off the vast walls. It’s contemplative, but I feel almost weightless, as if suspended in a waiting room for ideas. In the next, color and text surround me; vibrant and stimulating, this room pulses with questions about knowledge and connection. Curiosity stirs—a warmth in the chest to explore, to wonder at the meanings behind these research notes and technological displays. Together, these spaces evoke anticipation; I am both watcher and participant in the unfolding narrative about our relationship with technology and knowledge.
